rows.notes: Clear centered page title. Handwriting legible and no amounts on the line; treated as a structural header.

Description partly faded but readable as 'Civitati Ocon'. A clear '4' appears in the pounds column aligned to this row; shillings and pence columns empty. Some uncertainty on exact spelling of description due to handwriting.

Description clearly reads 'Mayors Capons'. Numerals aligned with this row show '14' in the shillings column and no pounds figure; interpreted as 0 pounds 14 shillings. Slight ambiguity whether a small pounds digit exists but none visible.
Handwriting reads as 'Curate Hastings' (curate of Hastings). A clear '1' appears in the pounds column aligned with the row; shillings/pence blank.
Description uncertain (reads 'Odi XI' or similar). A clear '18' aligns with the pounds column for this row. Uncertainty arises from the unusual description handwriting.

Description 'Do Sub-Treasurer' inferred from abbreviated 'Do' and following text; faint. A small '4' is visible near the pounds column for this line but alignment is slightly uncertain (could belong to previous/next row).
Reads 'Coll. Omn. Animi' (abbreviated). Numbers 4 | 12 | 6 are well aligned under the three columns and within valid ranges; column alignment clear from neighbouring total lines.
Single-word entry 'Balliol' is clear. The numeric '12 6' is aligned with the shillings and pence columns; no pounds value visible. Good column alignment from the Coll. row above.
Abbreviated name 'D. J. Baptista' readable. Numerals '8 2' sit in shillings/pence columns; pounds blank. Ink and alignment clear.
Description legible. Numbers appear as '1 10 4' across the three columns; the pence digit '4' is a bit faint but aligns well with the pence column and is within 0–11.
Text 'Bishops Synodals' clear. Numeric '1 1 4' is distinct and well placed; validation OK.

Latin phrase for building inspectors reads as 'Supervisori Aedificiorum' (handwriting slightly stylized). A clear '10' in the pounds column; shillings/pence blank. Good alignment with surrounding rows.
'Janitors' is legible. Amount '1 14 8' is clear, well aligned and valid (shillings <20, pence <12).

rows.description: Bibliothec. Dep. Ann ad D. J. Bapt.
rows.notes: Abbreviated Latin description for library-related payment readable. Numbers '6 6' visible in pounds and shillings; pence column blank. Slight abbreviation uncertainty in text only.
Reads 'Mitchells Pens: Do Do' (abbreviated); numeric '6 6' aligned with pounds and shillings. Description abbreviations are slightly ambiguous but amounts are clear.
Likely 'Concionatori pro 14 Nov.' (Latin). Numeric '2 2' is readable in pounds and shillings; pence blank. Description spelling uncertain but meaning clear from context.
Abbreviated 'Do ad Fest. Pasch.' (same pay for Easter festival). Numbers '2 2' again clear and aligned; description abbreviated but readable.
Description a little cramped but reads as 'Biblect. & pro 14 Nov.'. A '4' appears in the pounds column for this row; shillings/pence blank. Slight uncertainty on exact abbreviation.
Text 'Vicar of Merton' is clear. A distinct '30' sits in the pounds column for this row; shillings/pence blank.
'Do J. Newington' (likely 'Ditto J. Newington') is readable. A clear '40' in pounds column; alignment unambiguous.

Description is partially obscured/faded; reads as something like 'Pauperbns t' (interpreted as a pauper payment). A '5' is visible aligned with the pounds column. Significant uncertainty on exact text.
Description 'Postage Stamps Carriage &c' readable. Numeric '5 10' clearly aligned with pounds and shillings columns; pence blank. Good readability.
Line reads 'House & Window Tax & Lady Day' clearly. Numbers '22 1 4' are distinct and correctly aligned; pence digit '4' is clear.
Text 'University Marshals' legible. A '2' is visible in the pounds column; shillings/pence blank. Slight ink faintness but alignment clear.
Entry reads 'Corn Prices'. Numerals appear as '2 11' in pounds and shillings columns; the tens digit of shillings ('11') is legible but faint, producing moderate uncertainty.

Final total underlined at lower right reads '138.11.4'. Numerals are bold and well aligned and pass validation; no fraction. Description cell is blank on the original page (only the total figure is present).
